description: Letter from Khalaf b. Nāṣir to Barakāt b. al-Dayyān (probably Shelomo b. Eliyyahu). In Judaeo-Arabic. Requesting that he send quickly the pair of anklets (al-zawj al-khalākhil) that belong to Khalaf, the pair without the lawālib (springs? coils?). Barakāt is to give the anklets to the bearer of the letter, Sālim b. Ibrāhīm the brother of Ṣadaqa.
